/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/Metric.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/Tensor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/Geodesic.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/Traveler.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/Wormhole.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/TimeMachine.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/Constants.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/banner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/TimeTravelSimulator.dir/src/args.cpp.o -o TimeTravelSimulator  libglad.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 -ldl -lpthread -lGL /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so
